overview: BarterBrains is a peer-to-peer skill exchange platform where users learn and teach without money. Create a profile with skills you offer and want, get matched with compatible learners, chat, book sessions, and build your reputation through ratings and a trust score.
features: Bidirectional skill matching — get paired with users who want your skills and offer what you want
User profiles with skills offered, skills wanted, bio, and profile picture
One-to-one chat with real-time polling refresh
Session booking — request, accept/reject, and mark sessions complete
Post-session ratings (1–5 stars) and written feedback
Trust score per profile based on completed sessions and average rating
Dashboard with active sessions, completed sessions, and received ratings
In-app notification center for new matches, messages, and session requests
